name: Penguin Hatchery
short_description: Penguin Hatchery is a game about hatching penguins. Yeah, that's pretty much it. With the help of some clicking and some random things that sometimes make sense, sometimes don't you can begin to hatch penguin eggs and eventually hatch them at an insane rate!
detailed_description:
Penguin Hatchery is a game about hatching penguins. Yeah, that's pretty much it. With the help of some clicking and some random things that sometimes make sense, sometimes don't you can begin to hatch penguin eggs and eventually hatch them at an insane rate! Buy upgrades in total multiples of 25 to see which ones will appear in your village!

- 28 Upgrades
- 10 Achievements

More updates will be coming but I’m just one man so timing of the updates will be a little all over the place. Join the discord to ask questions and keep better updated.
